# ZintIcon

> ZintIcon - Minimalist Gradient Icon Generator

Create minimalist icons with gradient backgrounds directly in your browser and export them as SVG, PNG, or ICO.

## Product Summary
- Browser-based icon generator for minimalist icon concepts.
- Supports visual icon selection and gradient background customization.
- Exports assets as SVG, PNG, and ICO.

## Important URLs
- Home: https://zinticon.alexisgvrcia.dev/
- Sitemap: https://zinticon.alexisgvrcia.dev/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://zinticon.alexisgvrcia.dev/robots.txt
- Source: https://github.com/alexisgvrcia/zint-icon

## Preferred Citation
- Brand: ZintIcon
- Description: Create minimalist icons with gradient backgrounds directly in your browser and export them as SVG, PNG, or ICO.
